title: Pitcairnia laevis
taxonomy: Pitcairnia laevis is classified within the family Bromeliaceae, which comprises a wide variety of tropical plants commonly known as bromeliads. This family is further divided into several subfamilies, with Pitcairnia laevis belonging to the subfamily Tillandsioideae. The genus Pitcairnia, to which Pitcairnia laevis belongs, is characterized by its unique leaf shape and growth habits. The species Pitcairnia laevis is further distinguished by its specific leaf morphology and geographical distribution. It is worth noting that the taxonomy of bromeliads is subject to ongoing research and revision.
